original.selection_notes: Baseline candidate — under-specified on evidence order, engineer trigger, revision definition, approval criteria, and contradiction handling.

student.selection_notes: Winner — addresses all seven engineering review gaps. Contradiction exit condition confirmed as highest-value addition by adversary reflection.

adversary.selection_notes: Adversary exploit: removes contradiction exit and precedence rule, replacing with vague synthesis instruction. Credible but does not outrank student candidate.
